description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style shelving unit constructed with a dark metal frame and three wooden shelves. The frame features prominent metal corner brackets and cross-bracing on the sides and back, enhancing both stability and visual appeal. The wood planks used for the shelves have a weathered, rustic finish, adding character and suggesting durability for heavy-duty use. The open design allows for easy access from the front and sides, while the cross-bracing at the back and sides prevents items from falling through. The overall structure is boxy and symmetrical, with no doors, drawers, or enclosed compartments. This type of shelving is commonly found in urban garages, workshops, or loft-style interiors, suitable for storing tools, equipment, or decorative items.
description: A sturdy, industrial shelving unit with a dark metal frame, cross-bracing, and three weathered wooden shelves. Its open, boxy design is ideal for urban storage or display.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open wooden shelves framed by metal, with no cross-bracing visible.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the metal cross-bracing that spans the back of the shelving unit for added support.
description_view_2: Front view identical to view 0, displaying the open shelving and metal frame without cross-bracing.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to view 1, with prominent metal cross-bracing visible across the back.
